verify_results.name: condition_is_original_reproducer_style
verify_results.body:
define i1 @condition_is_original_reproducer_style(float %x) {
entry:
  %c = fcmp oge float %x, 0.000000e+00
  %nx = fneg float %x
  %sel = select i1 %c, float %x, float %nx
  %cmp = fcmp oeq float %sel, 0.000000e+00
  ret i1 %cmp
}
